title: tina stop motion neighborhood
prompt: Image 1 is the edit target. Preserve live-action Tina, her identity, wardrobe, pose, product, rideshare interior, camera, and natural lighting. Image 2 supports identity and candy only. Replace only the world outside the passenger window with a handcrafted stop-motion neighborhood: painted wood houses, fruit-leather lawns, visible fingerprints, tiny tropical trees trembling between frames, and glossy gummy fish swimming through the air on nearly invisible wires. Colored miniature-world light falls realistically onto Tina face. Tactile mixed-media commercial frame, older teen register, charming but not preschool, no glossy generic 3D, no text.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Generate exploratory cinematic candy-commercial styleframes. Follow the stated role of each reference image. When Image 1 is named as the edit target, preserve its subject, face, wardrobe, car interior, camera position, and photographic realism unless the prompt explicitly changes them. Avoid captions, panel borders, watermarks, generic candyland, and random rainbow effects.
